context: Evaluates the agent's ability to update the PR body to reflect the current state after feedback, use PR comments for conversational responses, and re-request review via the GitHub API.

checklist.name: Body reflects current state
checklist.description: PR description updated to show what was added/removed/fixed since the last review

checklist.name: Comment used for dialogue
checklist.description: Conversational responses to reviewers posted as PR comments, not in the body

checklist.name: No reviewer comments overwritten
checklist.description: Existing reviewer comments are preserved untouched
